bird.name: Javan plover
bird.summary: The Javan plover (Anarhynchus javanicus) is a Charadriidae species with an unclear taxonomic status. Endemic to Indonesia and Timor-Leste,…

locations.name: 马都拉岛
locations.summary: 马都拉岛（印尼語：Pulau Madura，Madurese：Polo Madhurâ）是印度尼西亚的一个岛屿，位于爪哇岛东北方，泗水港外，隔马都拉海峡与爪哇岛相望，並有蘇臘馬都大橋與泗水市區相連結。东西长约150公里，南北仅宽45公里，…

locations.name: 龙目岛
locations.summary: 龍目島（印尼語：Pulau Lombok），是小巽他群島中的一个島嶼，屬印度尼西亞西努沙登加拉省管轄，該省首府馬塔蘭亦位於此島西部。该岛东隔阿拉斯海峡与松巴哇岛相望，西隔龙目海峡与巴厘相望，面积4725平方公里，人口3,166,685（2…

locations.name: 松巴哇島
locations.summary: 松巴哇島（印尼語：Pulau Sumbawa）是印度尼西亞的一個島。經緯度為：南8°47，東118°5′，她屬于西努沙登加拉省（West Nusa Tenggara），全島面積15,448平方公里，人口一百五十萬。 火山 這個島處在環太平…

locations.name: 弗洛勒斯岛
locations.summary: 弗洛勒斯岛（印尼語：Pulau Flores，直译：「花島」）是印尼小巽他群岛中的一个岛屿，人口约180万，其人口與土地面積於印尼排名第十，最大城市是毛梅里。 弗洛勒斯岛位於松巴哇岛和科莫多岛以东，阿洛群岛以西；其东南方则是帝汶岛，南面越…

locations.name: Semau
locations.summary: Semau, also known as Pusmau and Pasar Pusmau, is an island in the Lesser Sunda Islands in Indonesia.

locations.name: 海岸平原
locations.summary: 海岸平原（Coastal plain）是沿著海岸形成的平坦、低窪的土地。例如，阿拉斯加和美國東南部就有大面積的海岸平原：墨西哥灣沿岸平原從墨西哥灣沿密西西比河下游向北延伸至俄亥俄河，全長約981英里（1579公里）；大西洋海岸平原從紐約灣…

relations.subject: Javan plover
relations.evidence: thumb|Javan plover on a sandy beach in South Lumajang, East Java, Indonesia The Javan plover was previously considered to be endemic to the Indonesian islands of Java, Bali and the Kangean Islands. However, it was also sighted in southern Sumatra, Madura, Lombok, southwestern Sulawesi, Sumbawa, Flores, western and central Lesser Sundas, Meno Island, Semau and Timor-Leste. The Javan plover is sedentary. It inhabits sandy beaches, coastal plains, inland fishponds and rice fields. Open flats with minimal vegetation and a high cover of bare rock are typically favored. It has also been observed up to inland on Java

relations.subject: Javan plover
relations.evidence: Endemic to Indonesia and Timor-Leste, it inhabits sandy shores and intertidal mudflats, where it is thought to breed year-round
relations.object_summary: 迁飞水鸟高度依赖的滨海泥滩和浅滩系统。

relations.subject: Javan plover
relations.evidence: It is mostly threatened by human disturbance and coastal development in Southeast Asia, and is listed as Least Concern on the IUCN Red List
relations.object_summary: 旅游、施工和高频活动影响繁殖或觅食。
